R0239132
Enterprise Cybersecurity Project Manager

The Opportunity:

Provide technical project management leadership for multiple cross-portfolio cybersecurity projects from kickoff through completion. Critically review project scope to ensure all potential cybersecurity impacts are addressed. Assemble cross-functional project teams, including technical and subject matter experts, assign action items, and track progress. Leverage an understanding of cybersecurity technologies, tools, and processes to ensure all areas of scope are adequately addressed. Develop, enforce, and track project and implementation timelines while balancing competing demands of engaged resources. Apply technical leadership, conflict resolution, and risk mitigation techniques to resolve implementation, deployment, and operational transition issues for all stakeholders. Identify and resolve potential technical execution gaps and serve as the trusted resource for overcoming delivery challenges throughout project execution. Proactively address challenging issues that arise during the project lifecycle, including resource and time-constrained situations. Support Enterprise Cybersecurity (ECS) portfolio teams to ensure timely and quality delivery of capabilities and services. Implement components of the cybersecurity stack and cyber tools. Assist in soliciting and critically reviewing team inputs for required reporting. Brief portfolio and senior leadership as needed. Leverage Jira, ServiceNow, Smartsheet, and other tools for tracking and reporting as needed. Due to the nature of work performed within this facility, U.S. citizenship is required.

You Have: 

5+ years of experience in project managem
